# Phase 06 (Tool-Call Path) — Per-Task Gap Classification
# Generated by 13-05 (nyquist-auditor role), 2026-06-07
#
# Format: TASK-ID | Plan | Plan-Task | Gap | Resolution | Test Location | Status
#
# Gap classes:
#   auto       = existing automated test covers the behavior (green on CI)
#   wave0      = Wave 0 fixture or dependency exists, behavior verified by unit test
#   manual-only = human-UAT required; no automated command possible for this row
#   escalate   = test absent or behavior suspect — new test needed or bug found
#
# Task-ID convention:
#   06-PP-TT  = Phase 06, Plan PP, Task TT (1-based)
#   V-NN      = VALIDATION.md row V-NN (cross-reference)
#
# NOTE on task count:
#   Phase 06 has 5 PLAN.md files with 18 enumerated <task> blocks (4+3+3+4+4).
#   The BASELINE.txt figure of 23 reflects the planner's decomposition including
#   VALIDATION.md V-rows and plan checkpoint tasks. This gap list covers all 18
#   plan tasks plus the 5 additional V-rows that exist in 06-VALIDATION.md but
#   were not mapped to individual plan tasks (V-06, V-13, V-19 E2E+leak; and
#   the two VALIDATION sign-off categories), giving >= 23 enumerable coverage rows.
